content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Irongate Construction
Customer ID: C011
Contract ID: K011
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: Renewal Discussion
Date: February 5, 2024
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Greg Halloran (VP of Operations)

Tom Rivera: Greg, thanks for getting on. Renewal is coming up end of March. Wanted to have a frank conversation about where things stand.

Greg Halloran: Tom, I'll be straight with you. The office team uses it but the field crew issue never got resolved. Offline mode still isn't there and the pre-download workaround didn't stick. The field supervisors stopped trying after a month.

Tom Rivera: I understand, and I know that was the core use case for you.

Greg Halloran: I've been looking at other options. There's a platform called Fieldlink that was built specifically for construction — it has offline mode built in and a simpler interface for field workers. We're going to trial it.

Tom Rivera: Is there anything I can do to keep the account? I can offer a significant discount on the renewal.

Greg Halloran: Tom, honestly at this point it's not about the price. The product doesn't fit our field use case and I can't justify renewing for the office team alone at this price point when a better-fit option exists. I appreciate everything you've done — you've been responsive and honest. It's just not the right tool for how we work.

Tom Rivera: I respect that, Greg. Let's make sure the offboarding is smooth. No hard feelings.
